title: Kureha Chases Chopper Away
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on kureha chases chopper away, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Chases Chopper Away. Kureha hides her feelings behind cruelty, pushing Chopper toward the sea and the life Hiriluk wanted for him. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Some of the villagers found it by chance.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: didn't expect a popeway to be set up from a place like this::

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Isn't this the ex-doctor Kureha's home?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't you think there's too many people riding this thing at once!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We can't just leave our hero dalton alone, especially when he's injured!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We'll fight too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fine, fine, but this thing is barely moving as it is right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please don't push yourself, Dalton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: C'mon! Put some muscle into that Pedallin'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh, what a nice view.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing, Dalton...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no cure for a fool...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you implying that I'm a fool...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Trying to play the goody two-shoed hero or something!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Know your place as my retainer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm sure you'll admit your wrongdoing after spending a week in solitary confinement.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your rebelliousness is just a little phase, I'm sure of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: you're an elite guard trusted by the citizens of this country, Dalton.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ughh...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So hurry up and come to your senses.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You've only been tricked by that quack doctor's words!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is what he said really worth abandoning your status, respect, and country!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All you have to say is sorry and I'll forgive you, Dalton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: status... What is it good for!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What is a King even Good for!?
